A

accessDeniedPage() - Method in class com.wip.controller.ErrorPageController
Handles GET requests to /access-denied and renders the access-denied error page.
addCorsMappings(CorsRegistry) - Method in class com.wip.config.CorsConfig
Registers global CORS mappings for all endpoints in the application.
addCustomer(CustomerDto) - Method in class com.wip.controller.CustomerController
Creates a new customer record in the system.
addCustomer(CustomerDto) - Method in interface com.wip.service.CustomerService
Creates and persists a new customer record using the details from the provided DTO.
addCustomer(CustomerDto) - Method in class com.wip.service.CustomerServiceImpl
Creates and persists a new customer record using the details from the provided DTO.
addParcel(ParcelDto) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ParcelController
Creates a new parcel booking for an existing customer.
addParcel(ParcelDto) - Method in interface com.wip.service.ParcelService
Creates and persists a new parcel booking using the details from the provided DTO.
addParcel(ParcelDto) - Method in class com.wip.service.ParcelServiceImpl
Creates a new parcel booking in the system.
addShipment(Long) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ShipmentController
Creates a new shipment for an existing parcel.
addShipment(Long) - Method in interface com.wip.service.ShipmentService
Creates a new shipment for an existing parcel.
addShipment(Long) - Method in class com.wip.service.ShipmentServiceImpl
Creates a new shipment for an existing parcel and generates a tracking number.
addTrackingUpdate(Long, TrackingUpdateDto) - Method in class com.wip.controller.TrackingUpdateController
Records a new tracking update for the specified shipment.
addTrackingUpdate(Long, TrackingUpdateDto) - Method in interface com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateService
Adds a new tracking update to a shipment.
addTrackingUpdate(Long, TrackingUpdateDto) - Method in class com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateServiceImpl
Adds a new tracking update to an existing shipment and updates its current location.
AppUser - Class in com.wip.entity
JPA entity representing a registered application user.
AppUser() - Constructor for class com.wip.entity.AppUser
 
AppUserRepository - Interface in com.wip.repository
Spring Data JPA repository for AppUser entity persistence operations.
AuthController - Class in com.wip.controller
Spring MVC controller that manages user authentication and registration flows.
AuthController(AuthService) - Constructor for class com.wip.controller.AuthController
Constructs an AuthController with the required authentication service.
authenticationProvider() - Method in class com.wip.config.SecurityConfig
Creates and configures a DaoAuthenticationProvider bean.
AuthService - Interface in com.wip.service
Service interface defining the authentication operations for the courier tracking system.
AuthServiceImpl - Class in com.wip.service
Service implementation that handles user registration for the courier tracking system.
AuthServiceImpl(AppUserRepository, CustomerRepository, PasswordEncoder) - Constructor for class com.wip.service.AuthServiceImpl
Constructs an AuthServiceImpl with the required dependencies.

com.wip - package com.wip

com.wip.service - package com.wip.service
 
com.wip.util - package com.wip.util
 
CorsConfig - Class in com.wip.config
Spring MVC configuration class that enables Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS).
CorsConfig() - Constructor for class com.wip.config.CorsConfig
 
CouriertrackingsystemApplication - Class in com.wip
Entry point for the Courier Tracking System Spring Boot application.
CouriertrackingsystemApplication() - Constructor for class com.wip.CouriertrackingsystemApplication
 
createShipmentFromParcel(Long, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ShipmentUiController
Handles the POST request when an admin confirms shipment creation from the confirmation page.
CurrentUserUtil - Class in com.wip.security
Static utility class for resolving the currently authenticated user from the Spring Security context.
CurrentUserUtil() - Constructor for class com.wip.security.CurrentUserUtil
 
Customer - Class in com.wip.entity
JPA entity representing a customer in the courier tracking system.
Customer() - Constructor for class com.wip.entity.Customer
Default no-argument constructor required by the JPA specification.
CustomerController - Class in com.wip.controller
REST controller for managing customers in the Courier Tracking System.
CustomerController(CustomerService) - Constructor for class com.wip.controller.CustomerController
Constructs a CustomerController with the required CustomerService.
customerDetails(Long, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.CustomerUiController
Displays the detail view for a single customer identified by their ID.
CustomerDto - Class in com.wip.dto
Data Transfer Object for transferring customer information between the API layer and the service layer.
CustomerDto() - Constructor for class com.wip.dto.CustomerDto
 
CustomerRepository - Interface in com.wip.repository
Spring Data JPA repository for Customer entity persistence operations.
CustomerService - Interface in com.wip.service
Service interface defining the business operations for managing customer records.
CustomerServiceImpl - Class in com.wip.service
Service implementation for managing customer records with role-based access control.
CustomerServiceImpl(CustomerRepository, AppUserRepository) - Constructor for class com.wip.service.CustomerServiceImpl
Constructs a CustomerServiceImpl with the required repository dependencies.
CustomerUiController - Class in com.wip.controller
Thymeleaf UI controller for managing customer records in the Courier Tracking System.
CustomerUiController(CustomerService) - Constructor for class com.wip.controller.CustomerUiController
Constructs a CustomerUiController with the required CustomerService.
customOpenAPI() - Method in class com.wip.config.OpenApiConfig
Creates and configures a custom OpenAPI instance for the Courier Tracking System.
CustomUserDetails - Class in com.wip.security
Custom implementation of Spring Security's UserDetails for the Courier Tracking System.
CustomUserDetails(AppUser) - Constructor for class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetails
Constructs a new CustomUserDetails wrapping the given AppUser.
CustomUserDetailsService - Class in com.wip.security
Custom implementation of Spring Security's UserDetailsService for the Courier Tracking System.
CustomUserDetailsService(AppUserRepository) - Constructor for class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetailsService
Constructs a new CustomUserDetailsService with the given AppUserRepository.

D

dashboard(Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.HomeController
Handles GET requests to /dashboard and populates the model with summary statistics.
DatabaseSeederConfig - Class in com.wip.config
Seeds the database on startup.
DatabaseSeederConfig() - Constructor for class com.wip.config.DatabaseSeederConfig
 
deleteByShipment_ShipmentId(Long) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.TrackingUpdateRepository
Deletes all TrackingUpdate records associated with the given shipment ID.
deleteCustomer(Long) - Method in class com.wip.controller.CustomerController
Permanently deletes the customer identified by the given ID.
deleteCustomer(Long) - Method in interface com.wip.service.CustomerService
Deletes a customer record by its unique identifier.
deleteCustomer(Long) - Method in class com.wip.service.CustomerServiceImpl
Deletes a customer record by its unique identifier.
deleteCustomer(Long, Model, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.wip.controller.CustomerUiController
Handles the deletion of a customer and redirects appropriately.
deleteParcel(Long) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ParcelController
Permanently deletes the parcel booking identified by the given ID.
deleteParcel(Long) - Method in interface com.wip.service.ParcelService
Deletes a parcel record and its associated shipment (if any).
deleteParcel(Long) - Method in class com.wip.service.ParcelServiceImpl
Deletes a parcel and its associated shipments from the system.
deleteParcel(Long, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ParcelUiController
Handles the deletion of a parcel booking and redirects appropriately.
deleteShipment(Long) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ShipmentController
Permanently deletes the shipment identified by the given ID.
deleteShipment(Long) - Method in interface com.wip.service.ShipmentService
Deletes a shipment from the system.
deleteShipment(Long) - Method in class com.wip.service.ShipmentServiceImpl
Deletes a shipment and its associated tracking updates.
deleteShipment(Long, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ShipmentUiController
Handles the deletion of a shipment and redirects appropriately.
deleteTrackingUpdate(Long) - Method in interface com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateService
Deletes a tracking update.
deleteTrackingUpdate(Long) - Method in class com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateServiceImpl
Deletes a tracking update from the system.
deleteTrackingUpdate(Long, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.wip.controller.TrackingUpdateUiController
Deletes a specific tracking update.

E

editCustomerForm(Long, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.CustomerUiController
Displays a pre-populated form for editing an existing customer's details.
editParcelForm(Long, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ParcelUiController
Displays a pre-populated form for editing an existing parcel booking.
editProfileForm(Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ProfileController
Handles GET requests to /profile/edit and renders the profile edit form.
editShipmentForm(Long, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ShipmentUiController
Displays a pre-populated form for editing an existing shipment.
ErrorPageController - Class in com.wip.controller
Spring MVC controller that serves dedicated HTTP error pages for the Courier Tracking System.
ErrorPageController() - Constructor for class com.wip.controller.ErrorPageController
 
existsByEmail(String) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.AppUserRepository
Checks whether an AppUser with the given email address already exists.
existsByUsername(String) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.AppUserRepository
Checks whether an AppUser with the given username already exists.
existsParcelsByCustomerId(Long) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.CustomerRepository
Checks whether any Parcel records are associated with the given customer ID using a JPQL count query.

F

findByCreatedBy_Username(String) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.CustomerRepository
Retrieves all Customer records created by the user with the specified username.
findByCreatedBy_Username(String) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.ParcelRepository
Retrieves all Parcel records created by the user with the specified username.
findByCreatedBy_Username(String) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.ShipmentRepository
Retrieves all Shipment records created by the user with the specified username.
findByCreatedBy_Username(String) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.TrackingUpdateRepository
Retrieves all TrackingUpdate records created by the user with the specified username.
findByCustomer_CustomerId(Long) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.ParcelRepository
Retrieves all Parcel records belonging to the customer with the given ID.
findByEmail(String) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.AppUserRepository
Retrieves an AppUser by their unique email address.
findByParcel_Customer_CreatedBy_Username(String) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.ShipmentRepository
Retrieves all Shipment records for parcels belonging to customers created by the specified user.
findByParcel_ParcelId(Long) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.ShipmentRepository
Retrieves the Shipment associated with a specific parcel ID.
findByShipment_Parcel_Customer_CreatedBy_Username(String) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.TrackingUpdateRepository
Retrieves all TrackingUpdate records for shipments belonging to parcels of customers created by the specified user.
findByShipment_ShipmentIdOrderByCreatedAtAsc(Long) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.TrackingUpdateRepository
Retrieves all TrackingUpdate records for a given shipment, ordered chronologically by their creation timestamp in ascending order.
findByShipmentIdAndCreatedBy_Username(Long, String) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.ShipmentRepository
Retrieves a Shipment by its ID that was also created by the specified user.
findByTrackingNumber(String) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.ShipmentRepository
Retrieves a Shipment by its unique tracking number.
findByUpdateIdAndCreatedBy_Username(Long, String) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.TrackingUpdateRepository
Retrieves a single TrackingUpdate by its ID that was also created by the specified user.
findByUsername(String) - Method in interface com.wip.repository.AppUserRepository
Retrieves an AppUser by their unique username.

G

generateTrackingNumber() - Static method in class com.wip.util.TrackingNumberGenerator
Generates a unique tracking number for a courier parcel.
getAddress() - Method in class com.wip.dto.CustomerDto
Returns the address of this customer.
getAddress() - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Returns the address supplied during registration.
getAddress() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Returns the address of this customer.
getAllCustomers() - Method in class com.wip.controller.CustomerController
Retrieves a list of all customers registered in the system.
getAllCustomers() - Method in interface com.wip.service.CustomerService
Retrieves all customer records visible to the currently authenticated user.
getAllCustomers() - Method in class com.wip.service.CustomerServiceImpl
Retrieves all customer records visible to the currently authenticated user.
getAllParcels() - Method in class com.wip.controller.ParcelController
Retrieves a list of all parcel bookings registered in the system.
getAllParcels() - Method in interface com.wip.service.ParcelService
Retrieves all parcel records visible to the currently authenticated user.
getAllParcels() - Method in class com.wip.service.ParcelServiceImpl
Retrieves all parcels accessible to the current user.
getAllShipments() - Method in class com.wip.controller.ShipmentController
Retrieves a list of all shipments currently registered in the system.
getAllShipments() - Method in interface com.wip.service.ShipmentService
Retrieves all shipments in the system.
getAllShipments() - Method in class com.wip.service.ShipmentServiceImpl
Retrieves all shipments accessible to the current user.
getAllTrackingUpdates() - Method in interface com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateService
Retrieves all tracking updates in the system.
getAllTrackingUpdates() - Method in class com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateServiceImpl
Retrieves all tracking updates accessible to the current user.
getAppUser() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Returns the AppUser account directly linked to this customer profile.
getAppUser() - Method in class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetails
Returns the underlying AppUser domain entity wrapped by this instance.
getAuthorities() - Method in class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetails
Returns the collection of granted authorities assigned to the authenticated user.
getBookingDate() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Returns the booking date for this parcel.
getBookingDate() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Returns the date on which this parcel was booked.
getConfirmPassword() - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Returns the password confirmation string supplied during registration.
getCreatedAt() - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Returns the timestamp at which this tracking update was created.
getCreatedAt() - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Returns the timestamp at which this tracking update was recorded.
getCreatedBy() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Returns the AppUser who created this customer record.
getCreatedBy() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Returns the AppUser who created this parcel record.
getCreatedBy() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Returns the AppUser who created this shipment record.
getCreatedBy() - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Returns the AppUser who recorded this tracking update.
getCurrentLocation() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Returns the current geographic location of this shipment.
getCurrentLocation() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Returns the current geographic location of this shipment.
getCurrentUserId() - Static method in class com.wip.security.CurrentUserUtil
Retrieves the unique internal user ID of the currently authenticated user.
getCurrentUsername() - Static method in class com.wip.security.CurrentUserUtil
Retrieves the username of the currently authenticated user.
getCurrentUserRole() - Static method in class com.wip.security.CurrentUserUtil
Retrieves the role of the currently authenticated user.
getCustomer() - Method in class com.wip.entity.AppUser
Returns the Customer profile linked to this user.
getCustomer() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Returns the Customer associated with this parcel booking.
getCustomerById(Long) - Method in class com.wip.controller.CustomerController
Retrieves the details of a single customer identified by their unique ID.
getCustomerById(Long) - Method in interface com.wip.service.CustomerService
Retrieves a single customer record by its unique identifier.
getCustomerById(Long) - Method in class com.wip.service.CustomerServiceImpl
Retrieves a single customer record by its unique identifier.
getCustomerId() - Method in class com.wip.dto.CustomerDto
Returns the unique identifier of this customer (read-only in API requests).
getCustomerId() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Returns the ID of the customer associated with this parcel.
getCustomerId() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Returns the unique identifier of this customer.
getCustomerId() - Method in class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetails
Returns the unique identifier of the customer profile associated with this user, if any.
getCustomerName() - Method in class com.wip.dto.CustomerDto
Returns the full name of this customer.
getCustomerName() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Returns the display name of the customer associated with this parcel.
getCustomerName() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Returns the name of the customer who owns the associated parcel.
getCustomerName() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Returns the full name of this customer.
getDeliveryStatus() - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Returns the delivery status recorded for this tracking event.
getDeliveryStatus() - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Returns the delivery status recorded for this tracking event.
getDestinationAddress() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Returns the destination (delivery) address for this parcel.
getDestinationAddress() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Returns the destination (delivery) address for this parcel.
getEmail() - Method in class com.wip.dto.CustomerDto
Returns the email address of this customer.
getEmail() - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Returns the email address supplied during registration.
getEmail() - Method in class com.wip.entity.AppUser
Returns the email address associated with this user account.
getEmail() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Returns the email address of this customer.
getEstimatedDeliveryDate() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Returns the estimated delivery date for this shipment.
getEstimatedDeliveryDate() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Returns the estimated delivery date for this shipment.
getFullName() - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Returns the full name of the registering user.
getLocation() - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Returns the geographic location recorded for this tracking event.
getLocation() - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Returns the geographic location recorded for this tracking event.
getParcel() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Returns the Parcel linked to this shipment.

Retrieves the details of a single parcel identified by its unique ID.

Retrieves a single parcel record by its unique identifier.

Retrieves a single parcel by its ID.
getParcelId() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Returns the unique identifier of this parcel.
getParcelId() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Returns the ID of the parcel associated with this shipment.
getParcelId() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Returns the unique identifier of this parcel.

Returns the list of Parcel bookings associated with this customer.

getPassword() - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Returns the plain-text password supplied during registration.
getPassword() - Method in class com.wip.entity.AppUser
Returns the BCrypt-encoded password of this user.
getPassword() - Method in class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetails
Returns the BCrypt-encoded password of the authenticated user as stored in the database.
getPhone() - Method in class com.wip.dto.CustomerDto
Returns the phone number of this customer.
getPhone() - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Returns the 10-digit phone number supplied during registration.
getPhone() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Returns the contact phone number of this customer.
getReceiverPhone() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Returns the receiver's phone number for this parcel.
getReceiverPhone() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Returns the receiver's phone number from the associated parcel.
getReceiverPhone() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Returns the receiver's phone number for this parcel.
getRemarks() - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Returns the optional remarks or notes for this tracking event.
getRemarks() - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Returns the optional remarks or notes for this tracking event.
getRole() - Method in class com.wip.entity.AppUser
Returns the authorization role of this user.
getRole() - Method in class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetails
Returns the raw role string assigned to this user as stored in the data source.
getShipment() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Returns the Shipment dispatched for this parcel.
getShipment() - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Returns the Shipment associated with this tracking update.

Retrieves the details of a single shipment identified by its unique ID.

Retrieves the shipment associated with a specific parcel.

Retrieves the shipment associated with a specific parcel.

Retrieves a shipment using its unique tracking number.
getShipmentByTrackingNumber(String) - Method in interface com.wip.service.ShipmentService
Retrieves a shipment by its tracking number.
getShipmentByTrackingNumber(String) - Method in class com.wip.service.ShipmentServiceImpl
Retrieves a shipment by its tracking number.
getShipmentDate() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Returns the dispatch date of this shipment.
getShipmentDate() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Returns the dispatch date of this shipment.
getShipmentId() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Returns the ID of the shipment associated with this parcel.

Returns the unique identifier of this shipment.
getShipmentId() - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Returns the ID of the shipment associated with this tracking update.
getShipmentId() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Returns the unique identifier of this shipment.
getSourceAddress() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Returns the source (pickup) address for this parcel.
getSourceAddress() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Returns the source (pickup) address for this parcel.
getTrackingNumber() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Returns the unique tracking number assigned to this shipment.
getTrackingNumber() - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Returns the tracking number of the associated shipment.
getTrackingNumber() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Returns the unique tracking number for this shipment.
getTrackingUpdateById(Long) - Method in interface com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateService
Retrieves a tracking update by its ID.
getTrackingUpdateById(Long) - Method in class com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateServiceImpl
Retrieves a single tracking update by its ID.

Returns the list of TrackingUpdate events for this shipment.
getTrackingUpdatesByShipmentId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.controller.TrackingUpdateController
Retrieves all tracking updates recorded for a specific shipment.
getTrackingUpdatesByShipmentId(Long) - Method in interface com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateService
Retrieves all tracking updates for a given shipment.
getTrackingUpdatesByShipmentId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateServiceImpl
Retrieves all tracking updates associated with a given shipment.
getUpdateId() - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Returns the unique identifier of this tracking update.
getUpdateId() - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Returns the unique identifier of this tracking update.
getUserId() - Method in class com.wip.entity.AppUser
Returns the unique identifier of this user.
getUserId() - Method in class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetails
Returns the unique internal identifier of the authenticated user.
getUsername() - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Returns the desired username for the new account.
getUsername() - Method in class com.wip.entity.AppUser
Returns the login username of this user.
getUsername() - Method in class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetails
Returns the username used to authenticate the user.
getWeight() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Returns the weight of this parcel in kilograms.
getWeight() - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Returns the weight of this parcel in kilograms.
GlobalExceptionHandler - Class in com.wip.exception
Centralised exception handler for all REST API controllers annotated with RestController.
GlobalExceptionHandler() - Constructor for class com.wip.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
 

H

handleAccessDenied(Exception, Model) - Method in class com.wip.exception.UiExceptionHandler
Handles AccessDeniedException thrown when the authenticated user attempts to access a resource or perform an action they are not authorised to perform.
handleBadRequest(IllegalStateException, Model) - Method in class com.wip.exception.UiExceptionHandler
Handles IllegalStateException thrown by UI controllers when a requested action violates a business rule or is otherwise not permitted.
handleGeneral(Exception, Model) - Method in class com.wip.exception.UiExceptionHandler
Handles any unrecognised Exception not matched by a more specific handler within the UI controller layer.
handleGenericException(Exception) - Method in class com.wip.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
Handles any unrecognised Exception not matched by a more specific handler.
handleIllegalState(IllegalStateException) - Method in class com.wip.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
Handles IllegalStateException thrown when a business-rule violation is detected.
handleNotFound(ResourceNotFoundException, Model) - Method in class com.wip.exception.UiExceptionHandler
Handles ResourceNotFoundException thrown by UI controllers when a requested record cannot be found in the system.
handleResourceNotFound(ResourceNotFoundException) - Method in class com.wip.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
Handles ResourceNotFoundException thrown when a requested entity cannot be found.
handleValidationErrors(MethodArgumentNotValidException) - Method in class com.wip.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
Handles MethodArgumentNotValidException thrown when a request body fails Bean Validation constraints.
home() - Method in class com.wip.controller.HomeController
Handles GET requests to /home.
HomeController - Class in com.wip.controller
Spring MVC controller that handles the home page, root redirect, and dashboard views.
HomeController(CustomerService, ParcelService, ShipmentService) - Constructor for class com.wip.controller.HomeController
Constructs a HomeController with the required service dependencies.

I

index() - Method in class com.wip.controller.HomeController
Handles GET requests to the root URL (/).
initDatabase(AppUserRepository, PasswordEncoder) - Method in class com.wip.config.DatabaseSeederConfig
Bean definition for seeding the database.
isAccountNonExpired() - Method in class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetails
Indicates whether the user's account has expired.
isAccountNonLocked() - Method in class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetails
Indicates whether the user's account is locked.
isAdmin() - Static method in class com.wip.security.CurrentUserUtil
Determines whether the currently authenticated user has the ADMIN role.
isCredentialsNonExpired() - Method in class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetails
Indicates whether the user's credentials (password) have expired.
isEnabled() - Method in class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetails
Indicates whether the user is enabled or disabled.
isShipmentAvailable() - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Returns whether a shipment is available for this parcel.

L

listCustomers(Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.CustomerUiController
Displays the paginated list of all customers.
listParcels(Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ParcelUiController
Displays the list of all parcel bookings in the system.
listParcelsByCustomer(Long, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ParcelUiController
Displays the list of parcel bookings belonging to a specific customer.
listShipments(Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ShipmentUiController
Displays the list of all shipments in the system.
loadUserByUsername(String) - Method in class com.wip.security.CustomUserDetailsService
Locates a user by their username and returns a fully populated UserDetails object.
loginPage() - Method in class com.wip.controller.AuthController
Handles GET requests to /login.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.wip.CouriertrackingsystemApplication
The main method that serves as the JVM entry point.

O

OpenApiConfig - Class in com.wip.config
Spring configuration class that sets up the OpenAPI 3 (Swagger) documentation.

P

Parcel - Class in com.wip.entity
JPA entity representing a courier parcel booking in the tracking system.
Parcel() - Constructor for class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Default no-argument constructor required by the JPA specification.

REST controller for managing parcel bookings in the Courier Tracking System.

Constructs a ParcelController with the required ParcelService.
parcelDetails(Long, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ParcelUiController
Displays the detail view for a single parcel booking identified by its ID.
ParcelDto - Class in com.wip.dto
Data Transfer Object for transferring parcel booking information between the API layer and the service layer.
ParcelDto() - Constructor for class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
 
ParcelRepository - Interface in com.wip.repository
Spring Data JPA repository for Parcel entity persistence operations.
ParcelService - Interface in com.wip.service
Service interface defining the business operations for managing parcel bookings.

Service implementation for managing parcel business logic.
ParcelServiceImpl(ParcelRepository, CustomerRepository, ShipmentRepository, AppUserRepository) - Constructor for class com.wip.service.ParcelServiceImpl
Constructs a ParcelServiceImpl with the required repository dependencies.

Thymeleaf UI controller for managing parcel bookings in the Courier Tracking System.
ParcelUiController(ParcelService) - Constructor for class com.wip.controller.ParcelUiController
Constructs a ParcelUiController with the required ParcelService.
passwordEncoder() - Method in class com.wip.config.SecurityConfig
Creates and returns a PasswordEncoder bean backed by the BCrypt hashing algorithm.
ProfileController - Class in com.wip.controller
Spring MVC controller that manages the user profile view and edit flows.
ProfileController(CustomerService) - Constructor for class com.wip.controller.ProfileController
Constructs a ProfileController with the required customer service.

register(RegisterDto, BindingResult, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.AuthController
Handles POST requests to /register and processes the user registration form.
register(RegisterDto) - Method in interface com.wip.service.AuthService
Registers a new user account along with an associated customer profile.
register(RegisterDto) - Method in class com.wip.service.AuthServiceImpl
Registers a new user account along with an associated customer profile.
RegisterDto - Class in com.wip.dto
Data Transfer Object for capturing new user registration details.

registerPage(Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.AuthController
Handles GET requests to /register and displays the user registration form.
ResourceNotFoundException - Exception in com.wip.exception
Exception thrown when a requested resource cannot be found in the system.
ResourceNotFoundException(String) - Constructor for exception com.wip.exception.ResourceNotFoundException
Constructs a new ResourceNotFoundException with the specified detail message.

S

saveCustomer(CustomerDto, BindingResult, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.CustomerUiController
Processes the submission of a new customer creation form.
saveParcel(ParcelDto, BindingResult, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ParcelUiController
Processes the submission of the new parcel creation form and persists the booking.
saveShipment(ShipmentDto, Model, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ShipmentUiController
Processes the submission of the new shipment creation form and initiates the shipment.
saveTrackingUpdate(Long, TrackingUpdateDto, BindingResult, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.TrackingUpdateUiController
Processes the form submission for a new tracking update.
search(String) - Method in interface com.wip.service.CustomerService
Searches for customers matching the given keyword across multiple fields.
search(String) - Method in class com.wip.service.CustomerServiceImpl
Searches for customers matching the given keyword across multiple fields.
search(String) - Method in interface com.wip.service.ParcelService
Searches for parcel records matching the given keyword across multiple fields.
search(String) - Method in class com.wip.service.ParcelServiceImpl
Searches for parcels using a keyword.
search(String) - Method in interface com.wip.service.ShipmentService
Searches for shipments using a keyword.
search(String) - Method in class com.wip.service.ShipmentServiceImpl
Searches for shipments using a keyword.
search(String) - Method in interface com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateService
Searches for tracking updates using a keyword.
search(String) - Method in class com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateServiceImpl
Searches for tracking updates using a keyword.
search(String, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.SearchController
Handles GET requests to /search and returns search results across all domain entities.
SearchController - Class in com.wip.controller
Spring MVC controller that handles the global search feature of the Courier Tracking System.
SearchController(CustomerService, ParcelService, ShipmentService, TrackingUpdateService) - Constructor for class com.wip.controller.SearchController
Constructs a SearchController with all required service dependencies.

Spring Security configuration for the Courier Tracking System.
SecurityConfig(CustomUserDetailsService) - Constructor for class com.wip.config.SecurityConfig
Constructs a new SecurityConfig with the required CustomUserDetailsService.
securityFilterChain(HttpSecurity) - Method in class com.wip.config.SecurityConfig
Builds and returns the primary SecurityFilterChain bean for the application.
setAddress(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.CustomerDto
Sets the address of this customer.
setAddress(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Sets the address for the new customer profile.
setAddress(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Sets the address of this customer.
setAppUser(AppUser) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Sets the AppUser account directly linked to this customer profile.
setBookingDate(LocalDate) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Sets the booking date for this parcel.
setBookingDate(LocalDate) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Sets the date on which this parcel was booked.
setConfirmPassword(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Sets the password confirmation string for validation.
setCreatedAt(LocalDateTime) - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Sets the timestamp at which this tracking update was created.
setCreatedAt(LocalDateTime) - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Sets the timestamp at which this tracking update was recorded.
setCreatedBy(AppUser) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Sets the AppUser who created this customer record.
setCreatedBy(AppUser) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Sets the AppUser who created this parcel record.
setCreatedBy(AppUser) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Sets the AppUser who created this shipment record.
setCreatedBy(AppUser) - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Sets the AppUser who recorded this tracking update.
setCurrentLocation(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Sets the current geographic location of this shipment.
setCurrentLocation(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Sets the current geographic location of this shipment.
setCustomer(Customer) - Method in class com.wip.entity.AppUser
Associates a Customer profile with this user.
setCustomer(Customer) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Sets the Customer associated with this parcel booking.
setCustomerId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.dto.CustomerDto
Sets the unique identifier of this customer.
setCustomerId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Sets the ID of the customer associated with this parcel.
setCustomerId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Sets the unique identifier of this customer.
setCustomerName(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.CustomerDto
Sets the full name of this customer.
setCustomerName(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Sets the display name of the customer associated with this parcel.
setCustomerName(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Sets the name of the customer who owns the associated parcel.
setCustomerName(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Sets the full name of this customer.
setDeliveryStatus(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Sets the delivery status for this tracking event.
setDeliveryStatus(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Sets the delivery status for this tracking event.
setDestinationAddress(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Sets the destination (delivery) address for this parcel.
setDestinationAddress(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Sets the destination (delivery) address for this parcel.
setEmail(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.CustomerDto
Sets the email address of this customer.
setEmail(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Sets the email address for the new account.
setEmail(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.AppUser
Sets the email address for this user account.
setEmail(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Sets the email address of this customer.
setEstimatedDeliveryDate(LocalDate) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Sets the estimated delivery date for this shipment.
setEstimatedDeliveryDate(LocalDate) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Sets the estimated delivery date for this shipment.
setFullName(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Sets the full name of the registering user.
setLocation(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Sets the geographic location for this tracking event.
setLocation(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Sets the geographic location for this tracking event.
setParcel(Parcel) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Sets the Parcel linked to this shipment.
setParcelId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Sets the unique identifier of this parcel.
setParcelId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Sets the ID of the parcel associated with this shipment.
setParcelId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Sets the unique identifier of this parcel.
setParcels(List<Parcel>) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Sets the list of Parcel bookings for this customer.
setPassword(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Sets the plain-text password for the new account.
setPassword(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.AppUser
Sets the password for this user.
setPhone(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.CustomerDto
Sets the phone number of this customer.
setPhone(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Sets the phone number for the new customer profile.
setPhone(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Customer
Sets the contact phone number of this customer.
setReceiverPhone(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Sets the receiver's phone number for this parcel.
setReceiverPhone(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Sets the receiver's phone number from the associated parcel.
setReceiverPhone(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Sets the receiver's phone number for this parcel.
setRemarks(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Sets the optional remarks or notes for this tracking event.
setRemarks(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Sets the optional remarks or notes for this tracking event.
setRole(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.AppUser
Sets the authorization role for this user.
setShipment(Shipment) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Sets the Shipment dispatched for this parcel.
setShipment(Shipment) - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Sets the Shipment associated with this tracking update.
setShipmentAvailable(boolean) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Sets the shipment availability flag for this parcel.
setShipmentDate(LocalDate) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Sets the dispatch date of this shipment.
setShipmentDate(LocalDate) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Sets the dispatch date of this shipment.
setShipmentId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Sets the ID of the shipment associated with this parcel.
setShipmentId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Sets the unique identifier of this shipment.
setShipmentId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Sets the ID of the shipment associated with this tracking update.
setShipmentId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Sets the unique identifier of this shipment.
setSourceAddress(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Sets the source (pickup) address for this parcel.
setSourceAddress(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Sets the source (pickup) address for this parcel.
setTrackingNumber(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
Sets the unique tracking number for this shipment.
setTrackingNumber(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Sets the tracking number of the associated shipment.
setTrackingNumber(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Sets the unique tracking number for this shipment.
setTrackingUpdates(List<TrackingUpdate>) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Shipment
Sets the list of TrackingUpdate events for this shipment.
setUpdateId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
Sets the unique identifier of this tracking update.
setUpdateId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
Sets the unique identifier of this tracking update.
setUserId(Long) - Method in class com.wip.entity.AppUser
Sets the unique identifier of this user.
setUsername(String) - Method in class com.wip.dto.RegisterDto
Sets the desired username for the new account.
setUsername(String) - Method in class com.wip.entity.AppUser
Sets the login username for this user.
setWeight(BigDecimal) - Method in class com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
Sets the weight of this parcel in kilograms.
setWeight(BigDecimal) - Method in class com.wip.entity.Parcel
Sets the weight of this parcel in kilograms.
Shipment - Class in com.wip.entity
JPA entity representing a shipment dispatched for a parcel in the courier tracking system.
Shipment() - Constructor for class com.wip.entity.Shipment
 
ShipmentController - Class in com.wip.controller
REST controller for managing shipments in the Courier Tracking System.
ShipmentController(ShipmentService) - Constructor for class com.wip.controller.ShipmentController
Constructs a ShipmentController with the required ShipmentService.
shipmentDetails(Long, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ShipmentUiController
Displays the detail view for a single shipment identified by its ID.
ShipmentDto - Class in com.wip.dto
Data Transfer Object for transferring shipment details between the API layer and the service layer.
ShipmentDto() - Constructor for class com.wip.dto.ShipmentDto
 
ShipmentRepository - Interface in com.wip.repository
Spring Data JPA repository for Shipment entity persistence operations.
ShipmentService - Interface in com.wip.service
Service interface for managing shipments.
ShipmentServiceImpl - Class in com.wip.service
Service implementation for managing shipment business logic.
ShipmentServiceImpl(ShipmentRepository, ParcelRepository, TrackingUpdateRepository, AppUserRepository) - Constructor for class com.wip.service.ShipmentServiceImpl
Constructs a ShipmentServiceImpl with the required dependencies.
ShipmentUiController - Class in com.wip.controller
Thymeleaf UI controller for managing shipments in the Courier Tracking System.
ShipmentUiController(ShipmentService, ParcelService) - Constructor for class com.wip.controller.ShipmentUiController
Constructs a ShipmentUiController with the required service dependencies.
showAddUpdateForm(Long, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.TrackingUpdateUiController
Displays a form for adding a new tracking update to a shipment.
showCreateForm(Long, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ParcelUiController
Displays a blank form for creating a new parcel booking.
showCreateForm(Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.CustomerUiController
Displays a blank form for creating a new customer.
showCreateForm(Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ShipmentUiController
Displays a blank form for creating a new shipment.
showStartShipmentPage(Long, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ShipmentUiController
Shows a confirmation page before starting a shipment from the parcel details view.

T

trackingByShipment(Long, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.TrackingUpdateUiController
Displays the complete tracking history for a specific shipment.
trackingHome(Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.TrackingUpdateUiController
Displays a list of all shipments to choose from for tracking.
TrackingNumberGenerator - Class in com.wip.util
Utility class for generating unique parcel tracking numbers.
TrackingUpdate - Class in com.wip.entity
JPA entity representing a single tracking event for a shipment in the courier tracking system.
TrackingUpdate() - Constructor for class com.wip.entity.TrackingUpdate
 
TrackingUpdateController - Class in com.wip.controller
REST controller for managing tracking updates associated with shipments.
TrackingUpdateController(TrackingUpdateService) - Constructor for class com.wip.controller.TrackingUpdateController
Constructs a TrackingUpdateController with the required TrackingUpdateService.
TrackingUpdateDto - Class in com.wip.dto
Data Transfer Object for transferring tracking update information between the API layer and the service layer.
TrackingUpdateDto() - Constructor for class com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
 
TrackingUpdateRepository - Interface in com.wip.repository
Spring Data JPA repository for TrackingUpdate entity persistence operations.
TrackingUpdateService - Interface in com.wip.service
Service interface for managing tracking updates.
TrackingUpdateServiceImpl - Class in com.wip.service
Service implementation for managing tracking update business logic.
TrackingUpdateServiceImpl(TrackingUpdateRepository, ShipmentRepository, AppUserRepository) - Constructor for class com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateServiceImpl
Constructs a TrackingUpdateServiceImpl with the required dependencies.
TrackingUpdateUiController - Class in com.wip.controller
Thymeleaf UI controller for managing shipment tracking updates.
TrackingUpdateUiController(TrackingUpdateService, ShipmentService) - Constructor for class com.wip.controller.TrackingUpdateUiController
Constructs a TrackingUpdateUiController with the required services.

U

UiExceptionHandler - Class in com.wip.exception
Centralised exception handler for Thymeleaf UI controllers annotated with Controller.
UiExceptionHandler() - Constructor for class com.wip.exception.UiExceptionHandler
 
updateCustomer(Long, CustomerDto) - Method in class com.wip.controller.CustomerController
Updates an existing customer record with new data.
updateCustomer(Long, CustomerDto, BindingResult, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.CustomerUiController
Processes the submission of the customer edit form and persists the updated details.
updateCustomer(Long, CustomerDto) - Method in interface com.wip.service.CustomerService
Updates an existing customer record with the details provided in the DTO.
updateCustomer(Long, CustomerDto) - Method in class com.wip.service.CustomerServiceImpl
Updates an existing customer record with the details provided in the DTO.
updateParcel(Long, ParcelDto) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ParcelController
Updates an existing parcel booking with new data.
updateParcel(Long, ParcelDto, BindingResult, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ParcelUiController
Processes the submission of the parcel edit form and persists the updated booking details.
updateParcel(Long, ParcelDto) - Method in interface com.wip.service.ParcelService
Updates an existing parcel booking with the details provided in the DTO.
updateParcel(Long, ParcelDto) - Method in class com.wip.service.ParcelServiceImpl
Updates an existing parcel's information.
updateProfile(CustomerDto, BindingResult, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ProfileController
Handles POST requests to /profile/update and saves the edited profile data.
updateShipment(Long, ShipmentDto, BindingResult, Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ShipmentUiController
Processes the submission of the shipment edit form and persists the updated details.
updateShipment(Long, ShipmentDto) - Method in interface com.wip.service.ShipmentService
Updates shipment details such as dates and location.
updateShipment(Long, ShipmentDto) - Method in class com.wip.service.ShipmentServiceImpl
Updates the shipment dates and current location.
updateShipmentLocation(Long, String) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ShipmentController
Updates the current geographic location of a shipment in transit.
updateShipmentLocation(Long, String) - Method in interface com.wip.service.ShipmentService
Updates the current location of a shipment.
updateShipmentLocation(Long, String) - Method in class com.wip.service.ShipmentServiceImpl
Updates the current location of a shipment.

V

viewProfile(Model) - Method in class com.wip.controller.ProfileController
Handles GET requests to /profile and renders the profile view page.
